creator: jSML4ThWwBID69YC@protonmail.com
text: Thank you for the explanation. If I understand correctly, I need FreeBSD 13 with the patch from https://bz-attachments.freebsd.org/attachment.cgi?id=222867 to avoid breaking user land applications. Is that correct? If so, I'll work on that errata form with my user case as an example for why this is worth pushing through.
